chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1794 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.7727/2018. 2. For hearing of main case. 14.03.2025 Mr. Aminuddin Ansari, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the respondent. Syed Shohrat Hussain Rizvi, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel this petition has impugned a notice, however, petitioner shall contest the same before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that notice be adjudicated vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner, however, pending aforesaid, no coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Counsel for the respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition be disposed of in the aforesaid terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
